top_signals.title: The May inflation numbers are due out Wednesday morning. Here's what to expect
top_signals.summary: If the Wall Street consensus is correct, the consumer price index is expected to show inflation running at a 4.2% annual rate.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: QatarEnergy Adds Another Oil Discovery to Namibia's Hot Streak
top_signals.summary: QatarEnergy has struck oil again offshore Namibia, adding another discovery to what is becoming one of the most impressive exploration runs in the industry. The company announced that its Merlin-1X exploration well in Petroleum Exploration License 39 (PEL 39) encountered oil with what it described as the most promising subsurface results seen so far in the license. The well found good reservoir quality, light oil, and limited associated gas—three words exploration teams generally like seeing in the same sentence. Merlin-1X is the tenth well…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Oil prices fall after U.S. Energy secretary says Hormuz ship traffic is increasing - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Oil prices fall after U.S. Energy secretary says Hormuz ship traffic is increasing  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: World's Largest Battery Maker Bets Big on Energy Storage
top_signals.summary: The world’s top battery manufacturer, CATL, expects sales of battery storage systems to account for half of its total sales in the coming years, signaling strong optimism about the battery storage sector as countries investing in alternative energy seek to make it more reliable. Storage is the only way to use electricity later than the moment it was generated, which is how electricity is normally used. With regions such as Europe and parts of Asia betting big on wind and solar electricity, battery storage has become a necessity. China, CATL’s…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CISA to transform how it assesses cyber vulnerabilities and risks, Andersen says
top_signals.summary: A binding operational directive being released Wednesday will direct federal agencies to change the way they address vulnerabilities by elevating some while putting others to the side.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
